title: bromus mollis var. racemosus
intro: Bromus mollis var. racemosus, also known as soft brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Bromus mollis var. racemosus include its ability to soothe irritated throats, ease congestion, and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
